---
title: "RSS 피드"
categories: [웹사이트, 블로그, RSS, 피드]
date: "2026-04-01"
date-modified: "2026-04-12"
toc: true
---

블로그의 RSS 피드 활성화

#### RSS 활성화 설정

1. `_quarto.yml`
`website:` 아래 `site-url:`, `description:` 설정

```yml
website:
  title: "myblog"
  site-url: https://www.myblogexample.io
  description: "A great sample blog"
```

2. 블로그 홈 `index.qmd`
문서 yml 헤더 `listing:` 아래 `feed: true` 설정

```yml
---
title: "myblog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
---
```

::: {.callout-tip}
### 메뉴바(navbar)에 RSS 링크 추가
`_quarto.yml`
```yml
website:
  title: "myblog"
  site-url: https://www.myblogexample.io
  description: "A great sample blog"
  navbar:
    right:
      - icon: rss
        href: index.xml
```
:::

##### 특정 분류만 RSS 피드

`feed:` 아래 `categories:` 리스트 지정

```yml
---
title: "myblog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed:
    categories: [news, posts]
---
```
